description_long: This helmet is constructed from dark, matte-finished metal with a rugged, hand-forged appearance. The surface is adorned with prominent, raised stitching or rivet-like details running from front to back along the crown, giving it a reinforced, almost spiked look. Both sides of the helmet feature a stylized animal emblem, possibly a dragon or lizard, engraved into the metal. The eye openings are narrow and angular, providing a menacing, protective visage. The lower portion of the helmet appears to be reinforced with a wooden or wood-textured band, adding to its robust, medieval aesthetic. The overall design suggests a blend of functionality and intimidation, suitable for urban scenarios with a fantasy or post-apocalyptic twist.
description: A dark, metal helmet with raised stitching, engraved animal emblems, and a wood-textured lower band, featuring narrow eye slits and a rugged, reinforced design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the engraved animal emblem, raised stitching along the crown, and the angular eye opening.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the central ridge, symmetrical stitching, and the narrow, intimidating eye slits.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the emblem and stitching, with clear visibility of the wood-textured lower band.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the layered, segmented back and the continuation of the central ridge and stitching.
attribute_brand_logo: A stylized animal emblem, possibly a dragon or lizard, is engraved on both sides of the helmet. The emblem is circular and features a coiled creature with a prominent head and tail.
attribute_graphic_design: Engraved animal emblem on both sides; otherwise, the helmet is a solid dark color with visible stitching details.
